{{video|link=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fiW7jvpnXYA&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5J2NSRbgQFU15PjQmC72TG6&index=83}}
Video made shortly before the establishment of the new [[Ninefold vaccine]] system
[[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Sevenfold Vaccine (video)]][[sn:Sevenfold Vaccine (video)]][[sn:Sevenfold Vaccine (video)]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
